              tenant page. Implemented via middleware-level redirect (NOT layout-level
              — middleware was cleaner: edge auth already has tenantId+roles in JWT,
              single auth-gate location matches existing pattern).

                admins to /admin and bounces tenant users away from /admin/*.

              cases: super_admin login→/admin, super_admin /dashboard→/admin,
              super_admin /patrol-schedule→/admin, site_admin login→/dashboard
              (no false redirect), site_admin /admin→/dashboard. Regression check:
              site_admin on /patrol-schedule has 0 console errors (was 8x 403).
              Branch feat/super-admin-redirect squash-merged to main, branch deleted
              local (remote was never pushed for this 1-commit flow).
